package handler

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Positive scenario for default_value_injection_scattered_across_handlers.
// Rule intent: Default value logic for pagination, filters, or booleans should be
// centralized, not repeated across multiple handler functions.
// Anti-pattern: Multiple handlers each duplicating the same defaulting logic.

type UserHandler struct{}

func (h *UserHandler) ListUsers(c *gin.Context) {
	page, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("page", "0"))
	size, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("size", "0"))
	sort := c.Query("sort")
	status := c.Query("status")

	// Scattered default injection
	if page == 0 {
		page = 1
	}
	if size == 0 {
		size = 20
	}
	if sort == "" {
		sort = "created_at"
	}
	if status == "" {
		status = "active"
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"page":   page,
		"size":   size,
		"sort":   sort,
		"status": status,
	})
}

func (h *UserHandler) ListOrders(c *gin.Context) {
	page, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("page", "0"))
	size, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("size", "0"))
	sort := c.Query("sort")
	status := c.Query("status")

	// Same scattered default injection repeated
	if page == 0 {
		page = 1
	}
	if size == 0 {
		size = 20
	}
	if sort == "" {
		sort = "created_at"
	}
	if status == "" {
		status = "pending"
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"page":   page,
		"size":   size,
		"sort":   sort,
		"status": status,
	})
}

func (h *UserHandler) ListProducts(c *gin.Context) {
	page, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("page", "0"))
	size, _ := strconv.Atoi(c.DefaultQuery("size", "0"))
	sort := c.Query("sort")
	status := c.Query("status")

	// Same scattered default injection repeated again
	if page == 0 {
		page = 1
	}
	if size == 0 {
		size = 20
	}
	if sort == "" {
		sort = "name"
	}
	if status == "" {
		status = "available"
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
		"page":   page,
		"size":   size,
		"sort":   sort,
		"status": status,
	})
}
